sentences.arabic: تَسَاءَلَ جَابِرٌ كَيْفَ يَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْعُنْوَانِ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Jabir se pitao kako da dođe do nove adrese.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir wondered how to get to the new address.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je aplikaciju karte na telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the map app on his phone.

sentences.translation: Upisao je adresu i slijedio upute.
sentences.translationEn: He typed the address and followed the directions.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ دُونَ أَيِّ مُشْكِلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je na mjesto bez ikakvih problema.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived at the place without any problem.
